LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: A R G U E D. AT THE CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING ON DEFENDANTS PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY AND PG&E CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, MOTION TO STAY PROCEEDINGS. DEFENDANTS' REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE AND SUPPLEMENTAL REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE ARE GRANTED. DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THIS ACTION IS BARRED BY PUB. UTIL. CODE 1759. THROUGH THE PROCEEDING COMMENCED BY THE ORDER INSTITUTING INVESTIGATION, I.12-01-007, CALIFORNIA PUBLIC UTILITIES COMMISSION, JANUARY 12, 2012, THE CALIFORNIA PUBLIC UTILITIES COMMISSION HAS EXERCISED ITS JURISDICTION OVER THE SUBJECT MATTER OF THIS SUIT. THIS ACTION INTERFERES WITH THE CALIFORNIA PUBLIC UTILITIES COMMISSION'S JURISDICTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: RICHARD KRAMER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

Appearances:
Eric Matthew Hairston, Esq. Tel. 415.773.5617 and Joseph M. Matkins, Esq. Tel. 415.773.5505, of Orrick Herrington & Sutcliffe, for defendant and moving party;
Peter J. Koenig, Esq. of Walker Hamilton & Koenig, Tel. 415.986.3339, for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: A R G U E D. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling on DEFENDANTs PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY and PG&E CORPORATION's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT or, in the alternative, Motion To Stay Proceedings. Defendants' Request for Judicial Notice and Supplemental Request for Judicial Notice are granted. Defendants' demurrer is sustained without leave to amend. This action is barred by Pub. Util. Code 1759. Through the proceeding commenced by the Order Instituting Investigation, I.12-01-007, California Public Utilities Commission, January 12, 2012, the California Public Utilities Commission has exercised its jurisdiction over the subject matter of this suit. This action interferes with the California Public Utilities Commission's jurisdiction. Order signed in open court. Judge: Richard Kramer; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
